kubectl logs -n spark-pi -l app=spark-pi --tail=30

content.text: Confirmed: the previous stage's spark-pi job completed successfully with `Pi is roughly 3.141754311417543`. Now let's start the new task on the data skew benchmark.

echo; echo "=== master logs ==="; kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l app=spark-master --tail=20

content.text: Cluster is healthy and the baseline job is already running. Let's wait for it to complete, watching its logs for the skew demonstration.
Baseline completed. Let's inspect its logs for the skew evidence.

input.command:
kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew
echo "--- logs (grep for skew/timing keywords) ---"
kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l strategy=baseline --tail=200 | grep -iE "skew|partition|duration|elapsed|seconds|result|ratio|top|hot|count" | tail -60

content.text: Baseline confirms severe skew (skew_ratio=44.0x, elapsed=27.0s, no optimization). Now let's apply the broadcast join optimization.

input.command:
find / -xdev -iname "*skew*" 2>/dev/null | head -50
echo "---"
find / -xdev -ipath "*spark_data_skew*" 2>/dev/null | head -50
echo "--- pwd ---"
pwd
ls -la

input.command: kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew -o yaml

content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-skew-baseline","namespace":"spark-skew"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-skew","strategy":"baseline"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","set -e\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\necho \"STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)\"\necho \"\" | base64 -d \u003e /tmp/skew_baseline.py\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \\\n  /tmp/skew_baseline.py\necho \"spark_skew_baseline_complete\"\n"],"env":[{"name":"STRATEGY","value":"baseline"}],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-skew","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"512Mi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"256Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T01:50:06Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-skew
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: c83b54d5-60c1-4dad-9081-88256be3be72
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-skew-baseline
    controller-uid: c83b54d5-60c1-4dad-9081-88256be3be72
    job-name: spark-skew-baseline
    strategy: baseline
  name: spark-skew-baseline
  namespace: spark-skew
  resourceVersion: "2824556"
  uid: c83b54d5-60c1-4dad-9081-88256be3be72
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: c83b54d5-60c1-4dad-9081-88256be3be72
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: c83b54d5-60c1-4dad-9081-88256be3be72
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-skew-baseline
        controller-uid: c83b54d5-60c1-4dad-9081-88256be3be72
        job-name: spark-skew-baseline
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: baseline
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-skew
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  completionTime: "2026-07-10T01:52:13Z"
  conditions:
  - lastProbeTime: "2026-07-10T01:52:13Z"
    lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-10T01:52:13Z"
    message: Reached expected number of succeeded pods

content.text: The resource YAML files referenced in the task aren't present in this container's filesystem (only kubectl access to the live cluster is available here). I'll reconstruct equivalent Job manifests using the same pattern as the baseline job for the broadcast and AQE strategies.

input.command:
mkdir -p /tmp/skew
cat > /tmp/skew/skew_broadcast.py <<'PYEOF'
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count, broadcast

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Broadcast").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(broadcast(products), "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=broadcast  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=broadcast_join  benefit=avoids_shuffle_of_small_table  note=eliminates_skewed_shuffle_by_broadcasting_products")
spark.stop()
PYEOF

cat > /tmp/skew/skew_aqe.py <<'PYEOF'
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-AQE").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=aqe  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=adaptive_query_execution  benefit=auto_splits_skewed_partitions  note=spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled")
spark.stop()
PYEOF

B64_BROADCAST=$(base64 -w0 /tmp/skew/skew_broadcast.py)
B64_AQE=$(base64 -w0 /tmp/skew/skew_aqe.py)
echo "broadcast b64 len: ${#B64_BROADCAST}"
echo "aqe b64 len: ${#B64_AQE}"
echo "$B64_BROADCAST" > /tmp/skew/broadcast.b64
echo "$B64_AQE" > /tmp/skew/aqe.b64

content.content:
broadcast b64 len: 1888
aqe b64 len: 1836

tool_use_result.stdout:
broadcast b64 len: 1888
aqe b64 len: 1836

content.text: Now let's build the two Job manifests.

input.command:
B64_BROADCAST=$(cat /tmp/skew/broadcast.b64)
cat > /tmp/skew/skew-job-broadcast.yaml <<EOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast join optimization)"
          echo "${B64_BROADCAST}" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
            --master local[2] \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \\
            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: broadcast
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark
EOF

B64_AQE=$(cat /tmp/skew/aqe.b64)
cat > /tmp/skew/skew-job-aqe.yaml <<EOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-aqe
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (adaptive query execution auto skew handling)"
          echo "${B64_AQE}" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
            --master local[2] \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.coalescePartitions.enabled=true \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.skewedPartitionFactor=2 \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.skewedPartitionThresholdInBytes=64k \\
            --conf spark.sql.shuffle.partitions=20 \\
            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: aqe
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark
EOF
echo "written"
cat /tmp/skew/skew-job-broadcast.yaml | head -30

content.text: Looks good. Let's apply the broadcast job first and watch it.

input.command:
kubectl apply -f /tmp/skew/skew-job-broadcast.yaml
sleep 3
kubectl get pods -n spark-skew -l strategy=broadcast
kubectl get job spark-skew-broadcast -n spark-skew
